---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for stratus-runtime
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

<!--
For large changes, opening this issue first (before a PR) helps us align on
design. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What is the use case? Is your request
related to a limitation you have hit (e.g. with the JIT controller, sandbox
controller, webhook proxy, or storage backend)?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, references, or examples about the feature request here.

## Are you willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I would like to work on this
- [ ] I can help test it
- [ ] No, just proposing
